model.description: Primary analysis model in provider/model format (for example vercel/openai/gpt-5.4-nano or anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5)

apiKey.description: Optional plaintext API key override. Use only in .bateye/config.local.json so it stays gitignored.

transport.description: Optional transport used to send requests. Use this when the model name represents the routed provider/model but the HTTP transport should be a gateway such as Vercel AI Gateway.

apiBaseUrl.description: Optional provider-specific base URL override for supported AI SDK providers. Not supported by the Codebite-backed agentic review runtime.

githubToken.description: Optional plaintext GitHub token override for pr-review --github. Use only in .bateye/config.local.json so it stays gitignored.

exclude.description: Additional paths/patterns to exclude from analysis

prReview.description: Configuration for the PR review command.

maxReviewers.description: Maximum number of reviewers to run in a single PR review. When the orchestrator selects more reviewers than this limit, the ones with the highest confidence scores are kept. Defaults to no limit (up to the absolute hard cap of 10).

autoApprove.description: Automatically approve the PR on GitHub if all findings are below the configured severity.

maxSeverity.description: Maximum finding severity that still allows auto-approval.

semanticVerification.description: Controls the LLM-based semantic verification pass that confirms findings are real. Disabling it skips the pass entirely - faster and cheaper, but may let false-positives through. Defaults to enabled.

disabledReviewers.description: Per-mode list of reviewer IDs to disable.

audit.description: Reviewer IDs to disable for audit mode.

prReview.description: Reviewer IDs to disable for PR review mode.

reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning/thinking effort for models that support it. Common values: minimal, low, medium, high. Some providers also accept xhigh or none. Ignored by models that don't support reasoning.
